decisions.decision: Phase 8 marked Complete after user-confirmed manual smoke walk of all 4 states (normal hub responsiveness, 0-accounts CTA, DB-error inline, dark-mode parity)
decisions.rationale: Verifier flagged status: human_needed pending those 4 checks; user walked them in browser and reported 'everything looks normal and works without any issues'

decisions.decision: Hub visual treatment intentionally minimal; user noted 'a bit boring but that's for a later date'
decisions.rationale: DESIGN_SYSTEM Principle P1 (calm over comprehensive) explicitly favors low visual stimulation. Phase 11 (Copy + Accessibility + Motion) is where targeted visual interest and microcopy polish land.

decisions.decision: globals.css pinned Tailwind v4 source-scan to ../../src via @import modifier
decisions.rationale: Tailwind v4.0.11 auto-scanned .planning/ and docs/ and generated invalid CSS from class-shaped shorthand (literal `pb-[env(...)]` in 07-02-PLAN.md). Crashed `next dev` but not `bun run build`. The `@source not` directive is only available in Tailwind 4.1+. Captured in code comment + project memory at ~/.claude/projects/.../memory/tailwind-source-restriction.md

next_action: Run `/gsd:discuss-phase 9` to scope Phase 9 (Spoke Pages: /budgets with full Budget Progress Cards + Spending by Category chart migration; /transactions with Income/Expenses KPIs + full transaction list; expanded /settings with Linked Accounts migration + budget editor + notification prefs). Requirements PAGE-04, PAGE-05, PAGE-06, PAGE-09. Depends on Phase 8 (done).
context_notes: Phase 8 closed cleanly end-to-end in one session: /gsd:resume-work picked up at the between-Phase-7-and-8 handoff, then full pipeline (discuss → ui-phase → plan → execute → verify) ran without major issues. Notable session events captured for future sessions: (1) gsd-planner on Opus 4.7 returned with API 529 mid-final-return AFTER writing all 6 PLAN.md files — recovered via workflow step 9a filesystem fallback; future planner runs may want to use sonnet for resilience or break work into smaller chunks. (2) gsd-executor for plan 08-05 found its worktree at an old base commit `5e787a3` instead of the expected `dbe83887` — `worktree_branch_check` reset it automatically; the base-pinning mechanism works as designed and should not be simplified. (3) Tailwind v4 auto-scan of planning docs is a real footgun; the `globals.css` fix is now mandatory project setup. (4) The user explicitly approved each gray-area decision through 14 locked decisions in 08-CONTEXT.md; Phase 9 may inherit ~10 of those (greeting, currency formatter, edge-state philosophy, view-model props, server-component-first, no-PageShell-wrap, /legacy preservation) — discuss-phase 9 can scope narrower than Phase 8. Phase 9 spoke pages should reuse: TransactionItem component (Home + Transactions), formatCurrency from utils/currency, PageShell+PageHeader from layout, calculateAllBudgetProgress, getRecentTransactions. New work mostly: Spending by Category chart placement on /budgets, Linked Accounts panel on /settings, budget editor UI on /settings. Phase 11 (copy + a11y + motion) inherits any polish backlog. Branch `ui-tests` is 160 commits ahead of master; eventually a PR will need to land but not yet — milestone v2.0 is not done.
